title: pronephrium elmerorum
intro: Pronephrium elmerorum, also known as Elmer's fern, is a type of fern belonging to the family Mariaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. Pronephrium elmerorum is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been shown to provide various health benefits such as reducing fever and relieving pain. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions or decoctions to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
